layout.title: Privacy Policy
layout.description: How EFTMRA India collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information submitted through this website and related services.

body.content: EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP

paragraphs.content: This Privacy Policy explains how EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects personal information when you visit our website, submit forms, register for trainings, contact practitioners, purchase services, or otherwise interact with us.
By using this website or submitting personal information to us, you consent to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

We may collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, phone number, city, professional background, training interests, registration details, enquiry content, reviews, testimonials, payment or billing details, and other information you choose to share.

We may also collect technical and usage information such as IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, referring URLs, cookies, analytics information, form activity, and general website interaction data.

We use personal information to respond to enquiries, process registrations, provide training information, manage practitioner contact requests, send confirmations and service messages, administer courses, improve our website, maintain records, comply with legal obligations, and communicate updates where permitted.
We may use testimonials, reviews, or feedback for quality improvement and promotional purposes only where appropriate consent or lawful basis exists.

Our website may use cookies, analytics tools, embedded content, and similar technologies to understand website usage, improve user experience, remember preferences, support forms, and measure traffic. You may disable cookies through your browser settings, although some features may not function properly.

We do not sell personal information. We may share information with trainers, practitioners, internal team members, payment processors, email providers, website hosting providers, analytics providers, professional advisers, or other service providers where necessary to deliver our services or operate the website.
We may disclose information when required by law, regulation, legal process, safety concerns, fraud prevention, enforcement of our policies, or protection of our rights and users.
We take reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational steps to protect personal information. However, no online transmission or storage system can be guaranteed completely secure.

We retain personal information for as long as reasonably necessary for the purposes described in this policy, including service delivery, record keeping, legal compliance, dispute resolution, and legitimate business needs.

You may contact us to request access, correction, update, or deletion of personal information, subject to legal, operational, contractual, and record-keeping requirements. You may also opt out of non-essential communications by contacting us.

Our website may contain links to third-party websites or embedded services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices, content, or security of those third-party platforms. Please review their policies before submitting information.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time by posting a revised version on this page. Continued use of the website after changes are posted indicates acceptance of the updated policy.
Questions about this Privacy Policy may be sent to hello@eftmraindia.com.

layout.title: Refund Policy
layout.description: Refund, cancellation, and transfer terms for EFTMRA India trainings, registrations, and services.

body.content: EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP

paragraphs.content: This Refund Policy applies to registrations, trainings, workshops, services, online offerings, and other purchases made through EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP unless a separate written agreement or event-specific policy states otherwise.
Please review the refund and cancellation terms before registering or making a payment. By completing a purchase or registration, you acknowledge and accept the applicable policy.

Training seats are limited and may involve trainer commitments, venue arrangements, administrative work, course materials, and communication costs. For this reason, registrations may be non-refundable or only partially refundable depending on timing, programme type, and event-specific terms.
If a refund, transfer, or credit is available for a specific training, it will be communicated during registration or by the EFTMRA India team in writing.

If you are unable to attend a confirmed training, contact us as early as possible at hello@eftmraindia.com. Where feasible, EFTMRA India may allow a transfer to a future cohort, substitute participant, or credit toward another programme, subject to availability and approval.
Transfers are not guaranteed and may be subject to administrative charges, trainer approval, eligibility requirements, or event-specific restrictions.
Failure to attend a training, session, or service without prior written notice may result in forfeiture of the amount paid. Late cancellations may not be eligible for refund, transfer, or credit.

We reserve the right to reschedule, modify, postpone, or cancel a training or service due to operational, trainer, venue, safety, health, technical, force majeure, or other reasons. If EFTMRA India cancels an event, affected participants will be informed of available options, which may include transfer, credit, or refund as determined by the circumstances.

Approved refunds, where applicable, will be processed to the original payment method or another mutually agreed method. Bank charges, payment gateway fees, taxes, currency conversion fees, or administrative charges may be deducted where applicable.
Refund processing timelines may vary depending on banks, payment gateways, and administrative review.
For refund or cancellation questions, email hello@eftmraindia.com with your full name, registered email, programme name, payment details, and reason for the request.

layout.title: Terms Of Service
layout.description: Terms and conditions that govern access to and use of EFTMRA India services, website content, courses, and resources.

body.content: EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP

paragraphs.content: This website is operated by EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP. Throughout the site, the terms we, us, and our refer to EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP. By visiting this website, using our services, submitting forms, registering for training, or purchasing from us, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and any policies referenced on this website.
Please read these Terms carefully before accessing or using the website. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access the website or use our services.

You agree to use this website and our services only for lawful purposes. You may not use our services for any illegal, harmful, fraudulent, abusive, or unauthorized purpose, or in a way that violates applicable laws, intellectual property rights, privacy rights, or these Terms.
We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone for any reason at any time, and to suspend or terminate access where we believe these Terms have been breached.

Information on this website is provided for general informational purposes. We make reasonable efforts to keep content accurate and current, but we do not guarantee that all information is complete, current, error-free, or suitable for your particular needs.
Historical information, training dates, availability, fees, service descriptions, practitioner details, and website content may be updated, corrected, changed, or withdrawn without notice.

Training programmes, practitioner services, online resources, products, and related offerings may be subject to eligibility requirements, limited availability, schedule changes, venue changes, trainer changes, and separate registration terms.
Prices and service descriptions are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any service, event, product, feature, or content at any time.

You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate information when registering, purchasing, or submitting an enquiry. We may contact you using the email address, phone number, billing details, or other contact details provided by you.
We may refuse, limit, cancel, or review orders or registrations at our discretion, including where information appears inaccurate, incomplete, unauthorized, or inconsistent with our policies.

Our website may include third-party tools, links, payment gateways, embedded media, forms, or resources. These are provided as available and at your own risk. We do not control third-party platforms and are not responsible for their content, policies, accuracy, availability, or conduct.

If you submit feedback, testimonials, reviews, enquiries, suggestions, comments, or other materials to us, you are responsible for ensuring that your submission is accurate, lawful, and does not violate the rights of any third party.

Unless otherwise agreed in writing, you grant us permission to review, respond to, store, moderate, edit, and use submitted feedback or testimonials for service, administrative, quality, or promotional purposes, subject to applicable law and our Privacy Policy.

You are prohibited from using the site or its content for unlawful purposes; to solicit unlawful acts; to violate laws or regulations; to infringe intellectual property or privacy rights; to harass, abuse, defame, intimidate, or discriminate; to submit false information; to transmit malicious code; to collect personal information of others; to spam, scrape, phish, crawl, or interfere with security features.

layout.title: Disclaimer of Warranties and Limitation of Liability

paragraphs.content: We do not guarantee that use of the website or services will be uninterrupted, secure, timely, accurate, or error-free. The website and services are provided on an as-is and as-available basis except where expressly stated otherwise.

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP and its partners, trainers, employees, affiliates, contractors, suppliers, and service providers shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive loss arising from your use of the website, services, content, or third-party resources.

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP and its partners, affiliates, trainers, employees, contractors, service providers, and licensors from claims or demands arising from your breach of these Terms, misuse of the website or services, or violation of any law or third-party rights.
These Terms and any separate agreements through which we provide services shall be governed by the laws of India, with jurisdiction in Jaipur, Rajasthan, unless otherwise required by applicable law.
We may update, change, or replace any part of these Terms by posting updates to this page. Continued use of the website or services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of those changes.
Questions about these Terms of Service may be sent to hello@eftmraindia.com.

layout.title: Disclaimer
layout.description: Important limitations and conditions for using information published by EFTMRA India.

body.content: EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP

paragraphs.content: The information provided on the EFTMRA India website is for general educational and informational purposes only. It is not intended to replace medical, psychological, psychiatric, legal, financial, or other professional advice.

EFT, Matrix Reimprinting, training information, articles, testimonials, practitioner listings, and related resources are shared to help visitors understand our work and available services. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk.

Nothing on this website should be interpreted as diagnosis, treatment, cure, or prevention of any physical, psychological, or emotional condition. Always consult a qualified healthcare or mental-health professional about your individual circumstances.

If you are experiencing a medical emergency, severe distress, suicidal thoughts, or a mental-health crisis, seek immediate support from local emergency services or an appropriately qualified professional.

Course descriptions, certification pathways, practitioner profiles, reviews, availability, fees, dates, venues, and related details may change without notice. EFTMRA India makes reasonable efforts to keep information current, but does not guarantee that all information will always be complete, accurate, or up to date.
Practitioner listings and testimonials are provided for informational purposes. EFTMRA India is not responsible for independent practitioner-client arrangements unless explicitly stated in writing.

This website may include links to third-party websites, embedded media, payment tools, forms, or external resources. These are provided for convenience only. EFTMRA India does not control and is not responsible for third-party content, policies, or practices.

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, EFT & Matrix Reimprinting Academy India LLP, its partners, trainers, team members, affiliates, and service providers shall not be liable for any loss, injury, claim, damage, or expense arising from your use of this website, services, training information, third-party links, or reliance on published content.
Questions about this disclaimer may be sent to hello@eftmraindia.com.

layout.eyebrow: New Delhi · Mumbai · Bengaluru · Gurugram · Pan India
layout.title: Every Mind Deserves World-Class Healing.
layout.description: India's only internationally accredited EFT academy, authorised by EFTMRA U.K., founded by Karl Dawson, one of only 28 EFT Founding Masters in the world.

layout.title: Your body has a reset button.
layout.description: Emotional Freedom Technique, also called Tapping, sends a direct calming signal to the brain's threat-response centre by gently tapping on acupressure points while focusing on an emotional issue. It is validated in over 300 peer-reviewed studies, with measurable results often in a single session.

scienceCards.title: Calms the stress alarm
scienceCards.description: Tapping signals safety to the brain's threat centre and quiets the fight-or-flight response.

scienceCards.title: Lowers cortisol by up to 43%
scienceCards.description: Clinical trials show EFT can measurably reduce the body's primary stress hormone.

scienceCards.title: Shifts the nervous system
scienceCards.description: Move from fight-or-flight to rest-and-repair with results that feel immediate and lasting.

layout.introTitle: India's only internationally recognised EFT certification and why it matters.
layout.introDescription: There are many EFT workshops in India. Only one offers a globally recognised certification — EFTMRA India, the sole academy authorised by EFTMRA U.K.

highlights.title: International Recognition
highlights.description: Certification accepted globally, accredited by EFTMRA U.K.

highlights.title: Karl Dawson's Lineage
highlights.description: Learn from the gold standard of EFT mastery worldwide.

highlights.title: Clear Pathway
highlights.description: Transparent levels from beginner to internationally certified practitioner.

highlights.title: Ongoing Community
highlights.description: Swap sessions, mentoring circles, and practitioner development.

missionParagraphs.content: Every trainer on our faculty is internationally certified by EFTMRA U.K. and brings years of clinical experience in emotional healing and trauma work. From beginner to advanced practitioner, you'll learn from the best.

layout.title: From first tap to certified practitioner.
layout.description: A clear, transparent journey — from your first EFT weekend through to internationally recognised certification and beyond.
layout.audienceTitle: You're in the right place if you are…

steps.title: Attend EFT Level 1 & 2 Training
steps.subtitle: Your starting point.
steps.description: A 3-day intensive covering the complete EFT tapping protocol, from set-up statements and basic sequences through to professional-level trauma work, advanced protocols, and ethical practice. You leave ready to work with clients and begin your certification journey.
steps.meta: New Delhi · Mumbai · Bengaluru · Gurugram · Duration: 3 days

steps.title: Register with EFTMRA & Complete Online Requirements
steps.subtitle: Go official and gain practitioner status.
steps.description: Register as a student at eftmatrixacademy.com (£99/year membership) and complete the EFTMRA Code of Ethics. Complete the online training and 50-question assessment (£15 fee). Submit 10 case studies documenting your client work through 5 swap sessions with fellow students. Once approved, upgrade to EFTMRA Certified EFT Practitioner and get recognised globally on the EFTMRA directory.

steps.title: EFT Level 3: Advanced Practitioner
steps.subtitle: Master deeper trauma work.
steps.description: Build on your certified foundation with specialist skills, advanced client methodologies, and deeper trauma work. Expand the scope and impact of your EFT practice and required for practitioners pursuing the Matrix Reimprinting qualification.
steps.meta: Eligibility: Completion of EFT Level 1 & 2 \n In-person · 3–4 days

steps.title: Matrix Reimprinting: Gold Standard Certification
steps.subtitle: Become an elite practitioner.
steps.description: Master one of the world's most advanced EFT techniques. Matrix Reimprinting is the gold standard for emotional healing practitioners and recognised globally. Transform lives, establish authority, and place yourself among the elite in the field of emotional wellness.
steps.meta: Eligibility: Completion of EFT Level 1 & 2 (EFTMRA India or AAMET/AMT/EFT Universe/Gary Craig equivalent) \n In-person · 3–4 days

audienceItems.title: A health professional adding to your toolkit
audienceItems.description: Psychologists, counsellors, coaches, physiotherapists, and doctors worldwide are integrating EFT. Our certification gives you clinical credibility you can use from day one.

audienceItems.title: Someone beginning a new career as a Practitioner
audienceItems.description: No prior experience needed. Our structured pathway takes you from beginner to internationally certified practitioner.

audienceItems.title: An individual who experienced EFT and wants to share it
audienceItems.description: Many of our finest practitioners began as clients. We'll show you how to turn that experience into a profession.

audienceCTA.label: Not sure which path fits you? Talk to us

testimonials.quote: I came as a psychologist looking to add one tool. EFT is now the foundation of everything I do with clients.
I had no prior experience. EFTMRA India's Level 1 & 2 changed my life. I now run a full-time EFT practice.
The Matrix Reimprinting course was world-class. I travel internationally to see clients now.

layout.description: Train with India's only internationally accredited EFT academy and carry this life-changing skill to the people who need it most.

layout.title: Creating Internationally Accredited EFT Practitioners.
layout.description: India's only officially authorised EFT training academy, recognised by EFTMRA U.K. and built on the direct lineage of Karl Dawson.

body.content: EFTMRA India exists to make high-quality emotional healing accessible through properly trained practitioners. In a space where standards vary widely, we bring structure, accountability, and international alignment.
We work with individuals seeking personal transformation as well as professionals looking to integrate EFT into their existing practice or build one of their own.
We train practitioners who are prepared, not just certified.

layout.title: Certified directly through EFT's founding lineage.

nodes.name: Gary Craig
nodes.role: Originator of EFT Tapping. Developed the technique in 1995 and made it publicly available worldwide, sparking a global movement in emotional healing.

nodes.name: Karl Dawson
nodes.role: EFT Founding Master, one of only 28 worldwide. Founder of Matrix Reimprinting and creator of EFTMRA, establishing the global standard for EFT training.

nodes.name: EFTMRA U.K.
nodes.role: The global governing body for EFT practitioner training and certification standards. Operational across 40+ countries, maintaining consistent international quality.

nodes.name: EFTMRA India
nodes.role: India's only officially authorised EFT training academy, directly certified under EFTMRA U.K. and carrying the full weight of the founding lineage.

badges.title: Structured Learning
badges.description:
Foundation certification · EFTMRA U.K. recognised
Each level follows the approved curriculum, delivered through focused in-person training to build genuine competence at every stage.

badges.title: Guided Practice
badges.description:
Advanced techniques · Supervised case work
Practical application built through supervised sessions and structured case submissions, ensuring readiness before independent work.

badges.title: Real Capability
badges.description:
Karl Dawson method · Global recognition
Graduates leave with internationally recognised certification and ongoing support through our active practitioner community.

certificates.imageAlt: EFTMRA Trainer Certification - Dr. Shilpa Gupta

layout.title: Our Vision & Mission
layout.description: We operate with integrity, maintaining international standards without compromise. Our focus is on delivering meaningful training that produces capable practitioners, not just certifications. We believe in building a supportive professional community and holding a responsible, compassionate approach to healing work.

cards.title: Vision
cards.description: A future where access to skilled emotional healing is available across every community in India.

cards.title: Mission
cards.description: To train and support practitioners to a consistent, international standard, building a credible and trusted EFT ecosystem in India.
